# Vendored Dependencies — Licenses

All JavaScript, CSS, and font files in this directory are vendored from
their upstream packages for offline/local use. No npm or CDN required at
runtime.

## Vue 3.5.13
- **License:** MIT
- **Copyright:** (c) 2018-present, Yuxi (Evan) You
- **Source:** https://github.com/vuejs/core
- **Files:** `js/vue.esm-browser.js`

- **Copyright:** (c) 2019-present, Eduardo San Martin Morote
- **Source:** https://github.com/vuejs/router
- **Files:** `js/vue-router.esm-browser.js`
